store_info.description_short: Open-source, privacy-friendly web and product analytics — a self-hostable Google Analytics / Plausible alternative.
description_long: Rybbit is an open-source, privacy-first web and product analytics platform — a self-hostable alternative to Google Analytics and Plausible. It gives you real-time visitor dashboards, funnels, user journeys, sessions, retention, and event tracking without cookies and without shipping your visitors' data to a third party.

A lightweight (~18 KB) tracking script is GDPR/CCPA-friendly and requires no cookie banner. The stack is fully self-contained: a Next.js dashboard, a Node API, ClickHouse for high-volume event storage, Postgres for application and auth data, and Redis for sessions and background jobs.
Licensed AGPL-3.0, self-hosting is entirely free with no license keys or mandatory cloud services. Rybbit is a resource-heavy application (ClickHouse in particular) and targets larger shards.
hint: On first visit, register the admin account through the Rybbit login screen — the dashboard is private to your paired devices.
Add a website in the dashboard, then embed the generated tracking snippet on the site you want to measure. The tracking endpoint is publicly reachable so your visitors' events can be collected.
